mapper.select: SELECT user_idx, user_dt, seq_no, p_id, member_id, library_code, sex, birth_day FROM ELIB_MEMBER WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_MEMBER SET seq_no = #{seq_no}, library_code = #{library_code}, p_id = #{p_id}, sex = #{sex}, birth_day = #{birth_day} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select: SELECT user_idx, user_dt, seq_no, p_id, member_id, library_code, sex, birth_day FROM ELIB_MEMBER
